headline: Assessing Skyworks Solutions (SWKS) Valuation After Multi Year Share Price Weakness And Undervaluation Signals
summary: Recent share performance and business snapshot Skyworks Solutions (SWKS) has drawn investor attention after a period of weaker share performance, with the stock showing negative returns over the past month, past 3 months, year to date, 1 year, 3 years, and 5 years. Against that backdrop, the Irvine based analog and mixed signal chip maker reports annual revenue of US$4,053.8m and net income of US$394.3m. Annual revenue and net income growth figures are provided but not broken out by...
